description: Step into comfort and style with this versatile 6-pair pack of men's striped socks. Crafted from rich cotton material, these socks offer the perfect blend of durability and breathability for everyday wear. The classic striped pattern adds a sophisticated touch to your footwear collection, making them suitable for both casual and formal occasions. Designed to fit UK sizes 6-11, these one-size socks feature a comfortable stretch that ensures a snug fit without being restrictive. The cotton-rich composition helps keep your feet comfortable throughout the day, whilst the reinforced toe and heel areas provide added durability. Whether you're heading to the office or enjoying a casual weekend, these socks are an excellent addition to your wardrobe. The convenient 6-pair pack ensures you'll always have a fresh pair ready to wear.
